title: What It Takes for Regime Change in Iran: John Bolton
description: Former National Security Advisor John Bolton discusses regime change in Iran. John Bolton joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on “This Weekend.” (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Former National Security Advisor John Bolton discusses regime change in Iran. John Bolton joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on “This Weekend.” (Source: Bloomberg)
